No Poverty.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address poverty eradication or any of its targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course is fundamentally centered on the biotechnology and pharmaceutical industry, drug discovery, and stem cell applications, directly supporting the research and development of medicines and vaccines (Target 3.b).
evidence: 生技製藥產業經營管理 (biotech/pharma industry management)
幹細胞的應用 (Application of stem cells)

Quality Education.reason: As a graduate-level course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and advanced professional knowledge for employment (Target 4.4). Core Competency B explicitly addresses understanding social responsibility and sustainability issues (Target 4.7).
evidence: 習得科管與智財相關進階專業知識 (Students will acquire advanced professional knowledge...)
理解與辨別社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues)
跨領域（科技、智慧財產權、商業管理、創新創業等）的學習

Gender Equality.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course focuses on biotech/pharma industry management, innovation, and entrepreneurship, aiming to meet industry development needs. This directly supports achieving higher economic productivity through innovation (Target 8.2) and promoting entrepreneurship and decent job creation (Target 8.3).
evidence: 生技製藥創新創業 (biotech/pharma innovation and entrepreneurship)
符合產業發展上的需求
培養創新思考 (cultivate innovative thinking)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core subject matter revolves around the latest technology, management of the biotech/pharma industry, and innovation/entrepreneurship within this sector, directly aligning with enhancing scientific research and technological capabilities (Target 9.5).
evidence: 生技製藥產業經營管理 (biotech/pharma industry management)
生技製藥創新創業 (biotech/pharma innovation and entrepreneurship)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address reducing inequalities based on income, age, sex, disability, race, ethnicity, or other status.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address urban development, housing, transport, or cultural heritage.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Core Competency B explicitly states that students will 'understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues,' which aligns with promoting sustainable practices (Target 12.6).
evidence: 理解與辨別社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues)

Climate Action.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly address marine ecosystems, pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The course's focus on intellectual property rights in biotechnology can be plausibly linked to the legal frameworks for fair and equitable sharing of benefits from genetic resources (Target 15.6).
evidence: 智慧財產權及相關判例 (intellectual property rights and related cases)

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's significant emphasis on intellectual property rights, patent applications, and involvement of patent law professionals directly supports promoting the rule of law and ensuring access to justice in this specialized field (Target 16.3).
evidence: 智慧財產權及相關判例 (intellectual property rights and related cases)
專利商標事務所律師 (patent and trademark law firm lawyers)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly highlights 'industry-academia cooperation' and involves a diverse range of expert stakeholders from academia, healthcare, legal, and industry sectors, directly embodying multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.16).
evidence: 陽明交大/政大相關系所老師、醫院主管、專利商標事務所律師與主管、生技製藥產業主管等
